id.description: The ID of the worker process.

pid.description: The PID identifier of the worker process used by the operating system.

connections.description:
The number of accepted, dropped, active, and idle connections
per worker process.

accepted.description:
The total number of client connections
accepted by the worker process.

dropped.description:
The total number of client connections
dropped by the worker process.

active.description:
The current number of active client connections
that are currently being handled by the worker process.

idle.description:
The number of idle client connections
that are currently being handled by the worker process.

requests.description: The total number of client requests handled by the worker process.

total.description: The total number of client requests received by the worker process.

current.description: The current number of client requests that are currently being processed by the worker process.
